top_signals.title: Chance of new Bitcoin lows ‘extremely slim’ as long-term holders’ supply tops 15M BTC
top_signals.summary: Data suggest Bitcoin’s chance of dropping below $60,000 again is slim to none, thanks to longer-term investors holding more than 71% of the asset’s total supply.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Job training for robots: How China is getting machines ready to join the workforce
top_signals.summary: Tesla CEO Elon Musk said on the company's fourth-quarter earnings call that China is the biggest competition for humanoid robots.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Crypto PAC backed by Anchorage and Chainlink announces endorsements for 2026 midterms
top_signals.summary: Federal Election Commission filings showed only $175,000 in contributions to the hybrid PAC, which could influence US voters through media buys before key elections in several states.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on Github
top_signals.summary: Until this past weekend, a contractor for the Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) maintained a public GitHub repository that exposed credentials to several highly privileged AWS GovCloud accounts and a large number of internal CISA systems. Security experts said the public archive included files detailing how CISA builds, tests and deploys software internally, and that it represents one of the most egregious government data leaks in recent history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Poland joins Pentagon’s counter-drone marketplace amid unexpected US deployment cancellation
top_signals.summary: The Army is continuing to expand military cooperation with Poland through the Pentagon’s counter-drone initiative, the service announced on Wednesday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Coinbase introduces thematic perps tracking China, AI and US national security equity indexes
top_signals.summary: The contracts are based on MarketVector’s existing AI, defense and China indexes that track the 10 largest companies per sector.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea liberal party leads mayoral poll in 'conservative heart' Daegu
Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
top_signals.summary: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
